---
title: "About Me"
toc: false
---

## 👋 Hi, I'm @LottesofCode

I'm **Lottes Griffin, PhD** — a chemical physicist who moved from the lab bench into data, analysis and evaluating the output of complex systems.

* 🔬 Domain expertise in **chemistry, physics and quantitative scientific reasoning**
* 🤖 Interested in **AI evaluation, RLHF and model training** — where deep subject knowledge is the quality advantage
* 📊 Day-to-day in **Python, SQL, Snowflake** and data-quality evaluation at scale
* 💞️ Open to **data science / AI evaluation** collaboration
* 📫 Reach me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lottes-griffin/) or [lottes.salter@gmail.com](mailto:lottes.salter@gmail.com)

---

### From gas kinetics to data

Accomplishing my **PhD in Chemical Physics** sparked a passion for data and analysis. After a hard-fought battle in the gas kinetics laboratory to gather the data, I carried out computational modelling and statistical analysis to obtain rate coefficients — work that explained the behaviour of magnesium atoms and ions in the upper atmospheres of Earth and Mars, fed into atmospheric models accounting for satellite observations and led to several [journal publications](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lottes-griffin/details/publications/) and international presentations.

### Science → analysis → evaluation

I turned that enthusiasm toward data, building strong skills in **Python** (Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn), **SQL**, **Snowflake**, **AWS** and **ElasticSearch**, evidenced across [my portfolio](https://lottesofcode.github.io/Portfolio/) and [CV](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lottes-griffin/).

I now work as a **senior data quality analyst**, where much of my role is genuinely *evaluation* work: judging where automated classification is correct, diagnosing failure modes and running agreement-rate analysis across datasets of 600M+ records to decide whether a change actually improves output. It turns out that the instinct trained by a science PhD — *is this result real or is it noise?* — is exactly what high-quality AI evaluation needs.

### What I bring

A scientist's eye for correctness, comfort with large and messy data and the communication skills to explain a rigorous judgement clearly — to technical and non-technical audiences alike. I'm motivated, analytically minded and especially drawn to work where specialist scientific knowledge genuinely raises the bar.
